title: Funded-lane reanalysis option (metered, budget-capped)
context: Backlog — only if escrow exists. This task BUILDS the optional metered, budget-capped funded-lane reanalysis path; the task itself is donated infra work (no escrow exists yet). Any future funded reanalysis task must declare fundedBudgetUsd and never exceed its escrow cap. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Add the optional funded-lane reanalysis path (metered, hard budget-capped) so a future escrow-backed reanalysis can run without exceeding its cap.
acceptanceCriteria: Funded-lane reanalysis path is metered and enforces a hard per-task budget cap (never exceeds escrow).
Future funded reanalysis tasks must declare fundedBudgetUsd; this option is inert until escrow exists.
No secrets/API keys committed; commit signed off per DCO.
resources: C:/code/elyos/CLAUDE.md (funded lane: runner, API key, hard budget cap)
output: A pull request adding the optional metered, budget-capped funded-lane reanalysis path.
